tasks.name: Set up email service provider integration
tasks.description: Integrate a proper email delivery service like SendGrid, Resend, or Amazon SES through a Supabase Edge Function that handles authentication and API integration.
tasks.implementationGuide: Create a Supabase Edge Function that connects to the chosen email provider API. This should include environment variable configuration for API keys and setup of base email templates with merge field capabilities.

tasks.name: Create structured email template system
tasks.description: Implement a flexible template system using JSON files stored in the Supabase storage bucket, with support for HTML and text versions, and variables.
tasks.implementationGuide: Store email templates as JSON files in Supabase storage, with a structure containing translations for all supported languages. Each template should include subject, HTML content, text content, and metadata fields. Create a helper function to retrieve and process templates.

tasks.name: Implement email queue table in database
tasks.description: Create a streamlined email queue table that stores recipient information, template reference, variables, and status - but not the complete email content.
tasks.implementationGuide: Create a table with fields for recipient, template_id, language_preference, variables (as JSONB), status, retry_count, next_retry, and metadata. This should be minimal and focused on tracking, not content storage.

tasks.name: Create email sending edge function
tasks.description: Develop an Edge Function that processes the email queue, renders templates with provided variables, and sends via the email service provider.
tasks.implementationGuide: The function should query the email queue table, load appropriate templates from storage, merge variables, send via email provider API, and update status. It should handle errors gracefully with proper logging and retry logic.

tasks.name: Add database triggers for email events
tasks.description: Implement lightweight database triggers that simply add entries to the email queue when important events occur.
tasks.implementationGuide: Create database triggers for events like verification approval, payment confirmation, etc. These should only insert minimal data into the queue table (recipient, template ID, variables) rather than processing templates directly.

tasks.name: Set up scheduled function for email processing
tasks.description: Configure a Supabase scheduled function to process the email queue at regular intervals.
tasks.implementationGuide: Create a scheduled function that runs every few minutes to check for new emails in the queue, process batches of emails with rate limiting considerations, and handle retries for failed deliveries.

tasks.name: Implement email tracking and analytics
tasks.description: Add support for tracking email delivery, opens, clicks, and other engagement metrics.
tasks.implementationGuide: Integrate with email provider's tracking features, store tracking data in a dedicated analytics table, and create helper functions to query and analyze email performance.
